creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 192379
Proposed patch (since 463365 revision)

Patch to update devel/upp port from 11540 to 11873 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://sourceforge.net/projects/upp/files/upp/2018.1/
https://www.ultimatepp.org/www$uppweb$Roadmap$en-us.html

- Add patch to fix CVE-2018-8740 for uppsrc/plugin/sqlite3/lib/sqlite3.c, similar to ports r465275 changes

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
